basics.name: Luis Gadiel Mondragón Sánchez
basics.label: Information and Communications Technology Engineer
basics.summary: IT Engineer with 5 years of experience, currently serving as Senior Software Engineer for Rassini Brakes in Flint, Michigan. Being in charge of the software architecture, design, development and implementation of information systems, has allowed me to gain valuable experience in project and people management, leadership and software development. Recognized for strong problem-solving skills and the ability to translate complex challenges into practical, scalable solutions. I am passionate about continuous learning and applying emerging technologies to drive innovation. My core technical expertise includes React, JavaScript, Kendo UI, Node.js, REST APIs, SQL, OpenEdge 4GL, Progress Databases, and QAD-ERP management.

work.name: Rassini Frenos
work.summary: Full support for Rassini Brakes in Flint, Michigan, USA operations (remotely and physically). Developed and implementation of IMS System (Inventory Management System), which increased the efficiency of inventory management by the implementation RFID as the new standard process that achieved over 99% accuracy and reduced stock-taking times by up to 85%. Implementation of real-time data monitoring using control panels. Responsive web design using React, Kendo UI, Apache Echarts, Node JS and Progress OpenEdge 4GL, REST API and CIM loads to QAD-ERP to report in line production, downtimes, scrap, shippers control and the inventory management that eliminated 90% of manual and repetitive processes. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to align solutions with business and user needs. Additionally, I have been responsible for mentoring junior developers and leading the software development team in the absence of a software manager.
highlights: Delivered milestone achievements in inventory management system

work.name: Rassini Frenos
work.summary: Debugging, development, and monitoring of financial solutions such as reports, automatic uploads (CIM Interfaces), and browsers with the corresponding areas. Creation and implementation of modules and submodules for supplier payments in Rassini's Suppliers Portal. Tickets resolutions of software issues, incidents, and troubleshooting to QAD and Rassini information systems. Analysis, development, implementation, and training of software and systems for controlling foundry, machining and painting processes using React, JavaScript, REST API, OpenEdge 4GL, Progress Databases and QAD management.

work.name: Audi México
work.summary: Creation and implementation of a web application to manage follow-up request analysis of Audi Q5 vehicles in production processes using Oracle Apex and PL/SQL, system that allowed me to develop administration dashboards using Tableau with direct connection to the database. Achieved a 50% reduction in follow-up request analysis time and improved the efficiency of the process. Additionally, I was responsible for providing training and support to end-users of the system.

education.institution: Instituto Tecnológico del Altiplano de Tlaxcala

certificates.name: Intensive English Program Course - Houston, Texas

projects.name: Mana Coffee Web Page
projects.description: A project to renew the web page of Mana Coffee including a new design focused on the menu section for better user experience and new features.
